_info.name: KGB-MCP — Knowledge Graph Builder
_info.description: Knowledge Graph Builder MCP server. Transforms raw text or web content into structured, queryable knowledge graphs using local LLMs (Ollama/LM Studio). Supports 300MB+ content via intelligent chunking, Neo4j/Qdrant persistence, and real-time SVG graph visualization.

kgb-mcp.description: KGB — build & query knowledge graphs from text/URLs, persist to Neo4j/Qdrant, visualize as SVG
